description: Profile token create envelope: the save-the-secret warning plus the created token element carrying the one-time secret token value. The secret is returned to the user by design (it is shown only at creation); it is not output-redacted.

input.warning: IMPORTANT: The token below is shown ONLY ONCE. Save it now - it cannot be retrieved later.

canonical.warning: IMPORTANT: The token below is shown ONLY ONCE. Save it now - it cannot be retrieved later.
